account.title: {{username}}'s workbench
account.description: Manage Minecraft profiles, texture bindings, and launcher connection status in one place.
account.profileOverviewDescription: Review profile names, UUIDs, and current texture bindings.
account.sessionOverviewDescription: Review browser sessions and recent activity.
account.actionProfilesDescription: Maintain names, UUIDs, and texture bindings
account.actionWardrobeDescription: Upload, preview, and reuse skins and capes
account.actionLauncherDescription: Copy connection details for external launcher login
account.actionSessionsDescription: Review and revoke browser login devices
account.actionAdminDescription: Manage service settings, users, and audit records
account.nextActionsDescription: Configure a profile and textures, then add this server in your launcher and sign in.
account.workflowProfileDescription: Create a Minecraft profile the launcher can select while keeping its UUID stable.
account.workflowTextureDescription: Upload skins and capes to the texture library, then bind them to profiles as needed.
account.workflowLauncherDescription: Copy the API Root or drag the server card, then sign in with this site account.

auditPage.title: Activity
auditPage.description: Review login, profile, texture, and security events created by your account.
auditPage.emptyDescription: This account has not created any activity records yet.
auditPage.filteredEmptyDescription: Try a different action or entity type filter.

profiles.title: Minecraft Profiles
profiles.description: Choose a profile, preview its appearance, and manage its skin and cape.
profiles.directoryDescription: Create, search, and select Minecraft profiles. The workbench only edits the selected profile.
profiles.workbenchDescription: Preview the profile and manage skin or cape slot uploads, replacements, and unbinding.
profiles.workbenchEmptyHint: Choose a profile from the left first.
profiles.listDescription: Choose a profile to review or edit.
profiles.createDescription: Profile names are validated against Minecraft profile rules. The UUID remains stable after creation.
profiles.renameDescription: Launcher tokens selected for this profile will refresh before they can be used again.
profiles.noProfilesDescription: Create your first profile so launchers can present it during sign-in.
profiles.textureDescription: Use skin or cape slots to upload textures and bind them to the selected profile.
profiles.textureManageDialogDescription: Review and update skin and cape bindings for {{name}}.
profiles.deleteProfileDescription: This deletes {{name}} and removes all texture bindings for that profile.
profiles.deleteProfileImpact: Launcher tokens selected for this profile will be invalidated. Unreferenced texture objects follow backend cleanup rules.
profiles.previewEmptyDescription: Bind a skin to display the profile preview.
profiles.uploadDialogDescription: The uploaded {{type}} will be added to the texture library and bound to {{name}}.
profiles.deleteDialogDescription: This only removes the current slot binding from {{name}}. It does not delete the wardrobe asset.
profiles.fileHint: Choose a file to upload and bind.
profiles.fileDropTitle: Drop a PNG file here, or click to choose
profiles.fileDropDescription: Uploads to the texture library and binds to the selected profile.
profiles.fileDropActiveDescription: The file will be added to the texture library and bound to this profile.
profiles.textureUploadTooLarge: File is too large: {{size}} selected, {{max}} allowed.
profiles.textureUploadInvalidPng: This texture file could not be read. Choose a valid PNG.
profiles.textureUploadTooManyPixels: Texture is too large: {{width}} x {{height}} is {{pixels}} pixels, limit {{limit}}.
profiles.textureUploadInvalidDimensions: Texture dimensions do not match {{type}} rules: {{width}} x {{height}}.

wardrobe.title: Texture Wardrobe
wardrobe.description: Manage uploaded skins and capes, then bind textures to Minecraft profiles as needed.
wardrobe.uploadDescription: Upload a skin or cape to the texture library, then bind it to any available profile.
wardrobe.libraryDescription: Review reusable personal skin and cape assets.
wardrobe.emptyDescription: Upload a skin or cape to preview it here and bind it to a profile.
wardrobe.previewEmptyDescription: Select a skin or cape from the texture library to preview it and manage bindings.
wardrobe.bindDialogDescription: Choose the Minecraft profile that should use this {{type}}.
wardrobe.deleteDialogDescription: Delete this {{type}} from the texture library. Profiles using it will be unbound, and any unreferenced local texture file may be cleaned up by server rules.

personalSettings.title: Personal settings
personalSettings.description: Manage account identity, login devices, and secure sign-in methods.
personalSettings.securityDescription: Review browser sessions and revoke devices you no longer use.
personalSettings.passkeysDescription: Use bound devices or security keys for passwordless login.
personalSettings.passkeysHint: Your browser will ask for device verification before creating a passkey.
personalSettings.passkeysUnsupported: Passkeys are not supported by this browser.

sessions.title: Account Sessions
sessions.description: Review browser login devices, session expiry, and revocation status.
sessions.deviceListDescription: Ordered by recent activity to help identify devices still in use.
sessions.noSessionsDescription: Sign in again to create a new browser session.
sessions.browserSessionDescription: Browser login sessions protected by HttpOnly cookies.
sessions.launcherTokenDescription: Launcher access tokens are managed separately from browser sessions.
sessions.revokedSessionDescription: Review sessions that have been revoked or expired.
sessions.statusBreakdownDescription: Session counts grouped by active, expired, and revoked status.
